_comment: Example Claude Code hooks config. Place at .claude/settings.json at your project root. Students: read the comments and pick one of the two modes below.
_mode_1_comment: RECOMMENDED — runs tests once when Claude finishes a turn. Claude sees failures and keeps working until tests pass.
_mode_2_comment: OPTIONAL STRICT MODE — runs tests after every file edit. More rigorous, more noisy. Swap the hooks block above for the one below if you want this.
_typecheck_note: You can add a typecheck command to either hook by chaining: 'npm test --silent && npm run typecheck'. Keep it fast — hooks that take 30+ seconds break flow.
